metadata.name: Bind a New Life Insurance Policy

description: An applicant has been approved and has paid their first premium. The agent needs to officially bind the policy.

nodes.task_description: Confirm receipt of the initial premium payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies that the first payment has been successfully processed.

nodes.task_description: Confirm all delivery requirements have been met (e.g., signed policy delivery receipt).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all paperwork is complete.

nodes.task_description: Change the policy status from 'Approved' to 'In Force'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully issues the policy, making it active.
